description: Unified MCP lookup server for ICD-11, SNOMED, LOINC, RxNorm, MeSH, ATC, CID-10. 37 tools, MIT.
name: io.github.SidneyBissoli/medical-terminologies-mcp

environmentVariables.description: WHO ICD-11 API Client ID. Required only for ICD-11 tools.
environmentVariables.name: WHO_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: WHO ICD-11 API Client Secret. Required only for ICD-11 tools.
environmentVariables.name: WHO_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: ICD-11 release to query (e.g. 2024-01, 2025-01). Optional; defaults to 2024-01.
environmentVariables.name: WHO_ICD11_RELEASE_ID

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to register the 6 SNOMED-dependent tools. Requires SNOMED_BASE_URL.
environmentVariables.name: ENABLE_SNOMED_TOOLS

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of a self-hosted Snowstorm instance. Required only when ENABLE_SNOMED_TOOLS is true.
environmentVariables.name: SNOMED_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Accept-Language tag(s) for SNOMED responses (e.g. pt, pt-BR, es). Optional; defaults to 'en'.
environmentVariables.name: SNOMED_LANGUAGE

environmentVariables.description: pino log level. Optional; defaults to 'info'.
environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL

packageArguments.description: TCP port to listen on. Update the transport URL above if you change this.
packageArguments.name: --port

packageArguments.description: Bind address. Defaults to 127.0.0.1 in CLI; 0.0.0.0 here so containers can route in.
packageArguments.name: --host

title: Medical Terminologies MCP
